topic: farm_equipment adds an 'equipment' base field to the LOG entity
evidence: modules/asset/equipment/src/Hook/FieldHooks.php entityBaseFieldInfo() adds an entity_reference base field 'equipment' (target asset bundle=equipment, multiple) to entity_type 'log' ('What equipment was used?'), plus farm_import_csv_base_fields + farm_ui_views_base_fields registration and ThemeHooks field-group placement. This is a cross-family field on the LOG entity, not the equipment asset bundle — it belongs to the log spine, not this asset-bundle spine. The spine vocab scan ('label-only new bundle, no new fields') missed it because it lives in a hook, not the AssetType plugin.
decision_taken: NOT built in the asset-spine surface; the equipment bundle here holds only its own asset-side typed fields
reversal_condition: a wave that owns the log entity's base-field set picks up the 'equipment used' reference (log-family, not asset-family)
